article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In 47 Below-Market Rental Units at 5860 Olive Avenue via Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed a bylaw on June 24, 2025, authorizing a legally binding housing agreement with Polygon Onyx Homes Ltd. This agreement requires 47 of the units in a new 34-storey tower to be rented at below-market rates to income-qualifying tenants.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
